Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
// Exports the contents of a grid (using the selected order and filters) to an Excel file. LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context)
Do 'OpenDocument'
&CellRow = 1 &FirstColumn = 1
Do 'LoadGridState'
Do 'WriteFilters'
Do 'WriteColumnTitles'
Do 'WriteData'
Do 'CloseDocument'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
Sub 'OpenDocument'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&Random = Random() * 10000 &Filename = !"ExportWWVendedor-" + &Random.ToString().Trim() + !".xlsx"
&ExcelDocument.Open(&Filename) Do 'CheckStatus' &ExcelDocument.Clear()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'WriteFilters'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
If not (&FiltroPesRaz.IsEmpty()) WWP_ExportWriteFilter(&ExcelDocument, true, &CellRow, &FirstColumn, "Razão") &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&FiltroPesRaz) EndIf
If not (&PesCod.IsEmpty() AND &IncluirDemitidos.IsEmpty()) WWP_ExportWriteFilter(&ExcelDocument, true, &CellRow, &FirstColumn, "Código") &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &PesCod &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = '' do Case Case &IncluirDemitidos.ToString().Trim() = "S" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = "Vigêntes/Demitidos"
Case &IncluirDemitidos.ToString().Trim() = "N" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = " Vendedores Vigêntes"
Case &IncluirDemitidos.ToString().Trim() = "A" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = " Vendedores Demitidos"
EndCase EndIf
If not (&PesSts.IsEmpty() AND &PesIsVen.IsEmpty()) WWP_ExportWriteFilter(&ExcelDocument, true, &CellRow, &FirstColumn, "Sts") If Not &PesSts.IsEmpty() &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = &PesSts.EnumerationDescription() Endif &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = '' do Case Case &PesIsVen.ToString().Trim() = "true" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = "Vendedores"
Case &PesIsVen.ToString().Trim() = "false" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = "Todas Pessoas"
EndCase EndIf If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCpf1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "CPF/CNPJ" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesCpf1) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESSETCOD' &PesSetCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesSetCod1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Código Setor" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &PesSetCod1 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESSETNOM' &PesSetNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesSetNom1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Nome Setor" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesSetNom1) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESVENINTEXT' &PesVenIntExt1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesVenIntExt1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Interno" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True If Not &PesVenIntExt1.IsEmpty() &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = &PesVenIntExt1.EnumerationDescription() Endif EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'RATCOD' &RatCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &RatCod1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Cód.Ramo Atv." &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &RatCod1 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDCOD' &PesCidCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCidCod1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Cód. Cidade" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &PesCidCod1 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDNOM' &PesCidNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCidNom1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Nome Cidade" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesCidNom1) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' &PesCidUfeCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCidUfeCod1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "UF" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesCidUfeCod1) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESFAN' &PesFan1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesFan1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Nome.Fantas." &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesFan1) EndIf EndCase If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(2) &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCpf2.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "CPF/CNPJ" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesCpf2) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESSETCOD' &PesSetCod2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesSetCod2.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Código Setor" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &PesSetCod2 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESSETNOM' &PesSetNom2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesSetNom2.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Nome Setor" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesSetNom2) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESVENINTEXT' &PesVenIntExt2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesVenIntExt2.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Interno" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True If Not &PesVenIntExt2.IsEmpty() &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = &PesVenIntExt2.EnumerationDescription() Endif EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'RATCOD' &RatCod2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &RatCod2.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Cód.Ramo Atv." &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &RatCod2 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCIDCOD' &PesCidCod2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCidCod2.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Cód. Cidade" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &PesCidCod2 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCIDNOM' &PesCidNom2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCidNom2.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Nome Cidade" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesCidNom2) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' &PesCidUfeCod2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCidUfeCod2.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "UF" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesCidUfeCod2) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESFAN' &PesFan2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesFan2.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Nome.Fantas." &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesFan2) EndIf EndCase If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 3 &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(3) &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCpf3.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "CPF/CNPJ" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesCpf3) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESSETCOD' &PesSetCod3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesSetCod3.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Código Setor" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &PesSetCod3 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESSETNOM' &PesSetNom3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesSetNom3.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Nome Setor" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesSetNom3) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESVENINTEXT' &PesVenIntExt3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesVenIntExt3.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Interno" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True If Not &PesVenIntExt3.IsEmpty() &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = &PesVenIntExt3.EnumerationDescription() Endif EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'RATCOD' &RatCod3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &RatCod3.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Cód.Ramo Atv." &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &RatCod3 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCIDCOD' &PesCidCod3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCidCod3.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Cód. Cidade" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &PesCidCod3 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCIDNOM' &PesCidNom3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCidNom3.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Nome Cidade" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesCidNom3) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' &PesCidUfeCod3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCidUfeCod3.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "UF" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesCidUfeCod3) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESFAN' &PesFan3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesFan3.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Nome.Fantas." &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesFan3) EndIf EndCase EndIf EndIf EndIf &CellRow += 2
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'WriteColumnTitles'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&VisibleColumnCount = 0 If &Session.Get(!'WWVendedorColumnsSelector') <> '' &ColumnsSelectorXML = &Session.Get(!'WWVendedorColumnsSelector') &ColumnsSelector.FromXml(&ColumnsSelectorXML) Else Do 'InitializeColumnsSelector' EndIf
For &ColumnsSelector_Column in &ColumnsSelector.Columns If &ColumnsSelector_Column.IsVisible = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = GetMessageText(iif(&ColumnsSelector_Column.DisplayName.IsEmpty(), &ColumnsSelector_Column.ColumnName, &ColumnsSelector_Column.DisplayName)) &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Color = 11 &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf EndFor
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'WriteData'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
For each order EmpCod PesRaz when &OrderedBy = 1 order PesCod when &OrderedBy = 2 AND &OrderedDsc = False order (PesCod) when &OrderedBy = 2 AND &OrderedDsc = True order PesRaz when &OrderedBy = 3 AND &OrderedDsc = False order (PesRaz) when &OrderedBy = 3 AND &OrderedDsc = True order PesVenIntExt when &OrderedBy = 4 AND &OrderedDsc = False order (PesVenIntExt) when &OrderedBy = 4 AND &OrderedDsc = True order PesDtaAdm when &OrderedBy = 5 AND &OrderedDsc = False order (PesDtaAdm) when &OrderedBy = 5 AND &OrderedDsc = True order PesDtaDem when &OrderedBy = 6 AND &OrderedDsc = False order (PesDtaDem) when &OrderedBy = 6 AND &OrderedDsc = True
using DSWWVendedor(&FiltroPesRaz, &PesCod, &IncluirDemitidos, &PesSts, &PesIsVen, &DynamicFiltersSelector1 , &PesCpf1, &PesSetCod1, &PesSetNom1, &PesVenIntExt1, &RatCod1, &PesCidCod1 , &PesCidNom1, &PesCidUfeCod1, &PesFan1, &DynamicFiltersEnabled2, &DynamicFiltersSelector2, &PesCpf2 , &PesSetCod2, &PesSetNom2, &PesVenIntExt2, &RatCod2, &PesCidCod2, &PesCidNom2 , &PesCidUfeCod2, &PesFan2, &DynamicFiltersEnabled3, &DynamicFiltersSelector3, &PesCpf3, &PesSetCod3 , &PesSetNom3, &PesVenIntExt3, &RatCod3, &PesCidCod3, &PesCidNom3, &PesCidUfeCod3 , &PesFan3)
// Write cell values &CellRow += 1
Do 'BeforeWriteLine' &VisibleColumnCount = 0 If &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(1).IsVisible = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Number = PesCod &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf If &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(2).IsVisible = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(PesRaz) &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf If &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(3).IsVisible = True &gridPesFan = iif(PesFan.Length() > 30, Substr(PesFan,1, 30) + '...', PesFan) &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&gridPesFan) &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf If &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(4).IsVisible = True &GridPesTipPessoa = PesIsVen &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = &GridPesTipPessoa.ToString() &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf If &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(5).IsVisible = True &gridPesVenAreCodNom = PesVenAreCodNom &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&gridPesVenAreCodNom) &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf If &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(6).IsVisible = True &gridPesCidNom = PesCidUfeCod.Trim() +' / '+ PesCidNom.Trim()
&ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&gridPesCidNom) &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf If &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(7).IsVisible = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = PesVenIntExt.EnumerationDescription() &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf If &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(8).IsVisible = True If PesTip = 'J' //JURIDICA &CpfCnpj = PesCnpj Else &CpfCnpj = PesCpf EndIF
&ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&CpfCnpj) &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf If &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(9).IsVisible = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Date = PesDtaAdm &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf If &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(10).IsVisible = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Date = PesDtaDem &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf If &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(11).IsVisible = True &gridPesPrmFon = PesPrmFon &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&gridPesPrmFon) &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf
Do 'AfterWriteLine'
Endfor
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'CloseDocument'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&ExcelDocument.Save() Do 'CheckStatus' &ExcelDocument.Close()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'CheckStatus'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
If (&ExcelDocument.ErrCode <> 0) &Filename = "" &ErrorMessage = &ExcelDocument.ErrDescription &ExcelDocument.Close() Return EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'InitializeColumnsSelector'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&ColumnsSelector = new WWPColumnsSelector() WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PesCod", '', !'Código', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PesRaz", '', !'Nome Vendedor', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&gridPesFan", '', !'Fantasia', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&GridPesTipPessoa", '', !'Ven.', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&gridPesVenAreCodNom", '', !'Área Vendas', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&gridPesCidNom", '', !'UF/Cidade', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PesVenIntExt", '', !'Tipo', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&CpfCnpj", '', !'Cpf/Cnpj', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PesDtaAdm", '', !'Admissão', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PesDtaDem", '', !'Demissão', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&gridPesPrmFon", '', !'Fone', True, '')
&UserCustomValue = LoadColumnsSelectorState.Udp(!'WWVendedorColumnsSelector') If not(&UserCustomValue.IsEmpty()) &ColumnsSelectorAux.FromXml(&UserCustomValue) WWP_ColumnSelector_UpdateColumns(&ColumnsSelectorAux, &ColumnsSelector) EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'LoadGridState'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
// Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(!"WWVendedorGridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(!"WWVendedorGridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(!"WWVendedorGridState")) Endif
&OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc
For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILTROPESRAZ" &FiltroPesRaz.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESCOD" &PesCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"INCLUIRDEMITIDOS" &IncluirDemitidos.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESSTS" &PesSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESISVEN" &PesIsVen.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'BeforeWriteLine'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'AfterWriteLine'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
